## Breaking impact

<!-- Does this change make existing results incompatible with new ones?
     Does it require a policy_version bump? Which sub-version (taxonomy/rubric/scoring/normalization/schema)? -->

- [ ] Breaking change (requires MAJOR bump in affected sub-version)
- [ ] Non-breaking addition (MINOR bump)
- [ ] Documentation/clarification only (PATCH bump)
